makc        2010-08-23 18:31:41 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    textproc/stardict2-quick Makefile 
  Log:
  Remove run dependency on textproc/stardict2, the port can be used with
  any compatible dictionary program (e.g. stardict3, goldendict)
  
  PR:             ports/149465
  Approved by:    maintainer timeout (two weeks)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.11      +1 -3      ports/textproc/stardict2-quick/Makefile
